title: Turkish Cauliflower Pockets
description: A crispy, flavorful twist on traditional flatbread. Fill with roasted cauliflower, piquant sauce, and spices.
instructions: Toss cauliflower with 1 tablespoon olive oil, salt, and black pepper. Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix piquant sauce and Turkish red pepper flake.
Warm flatbread by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble pockets by spooning roasted cauliflower onto flatbread, followed by a dollop of piquant sauce.
Fold flatbread in half to enclose filling.
Brush tops with remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil.
Bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
